selections.name: Victoire Magique (gb)
selections.reason: Class dropper who has faced much tougher company in Group and Listed stakes. The drop to Allowance company makes him the clear one to beat.

selections.name: Derawar (ire)
selections.reason: Showed ability breaking his maiden two starts back and wasn't disgraced in Listed company last out. Fits well here.

selections.name: Nabab ' K
selections.reason: Enters on a two-race win streak in handicap company. Steps up in class but is in top form.

selections.name: Cuellar
selections.reason: Broke his maiden nicely two starts back. Needs to improve to beat the top choices but has upside.

danger_horse.name: Colbert (gb)
danger_horse.reason: Broke his maiden impressively last out and could step up.

selections.name: Villa Monceau (usa)
selections.reason: Extremely consistent filly who has hit the board in all five career starts. Overdue for a win.

selections.name: Marbellesa
selections.reason: Has shown tactical speed and held well for third in her last two starts. A major threat.

selections.name: Cadeau De Noel (ire)
selections.reason: Showed improvement in his second start to finish third. Can continue to progress.

selections.name: Delaja (ire)
selections.reason: Flashed ability two starts back when third. Rebound candidate.

danger_horse.name: Street Cry Star (ire)
danger_horse.reason: First-time starter taking money on the morning line. Watch the tote board.

selections.name: Off To Dubai
selections.reason: Has been running consistently in handicaps and gets a slight class relief here. Tactical speed is a plus.

selections.name: Divo
selections.reason: Just missed last out and draws the rail. Should save ground and be right there at the finish.

selections.name: Zaura
selections.reason: Has been facing tougher fields and dropping into this handicap spot makes her a live longshot.

selections.name: Pasang (ire)
selections.reason: Faced better company recently. The class drop should wake her up.

danger_horse.name: Yzya
danger_horse.reason: Has shown flashes of late speed and could pick up the pieces if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Arlong Fal (gb)
selections.reason: Multiple winner who has proven class at this level. Tactical speed from an inside draw is ideal.

selections.name: Trinquette
selections.reason: Consistent type who rarely runs a bad race. Should be stalking the pace and pouncing late.

selections.name: Deal
selections.reason: Broke his maiden impressively two starts back. Has upside and gets a top jockey.

selections.name: Apolide
selections.reason: Has two wins in his last five starts. Cannot be ignored at this level.

danger_horse.name: Mister Charmes (ire)
danger_horse.reason: Lightly raced with a win and a second. Still improving.

selections.name: May It Be (ire)
selections.reason: Class standout who has been running in Group and Listed company. Drops to Allowance and should dominate.

selections.name: Niagaro (ger)
selections.reason: Another class dropper who has won at the Listed level. The main threat to the top choice.

selections.name: Step Morning
selections.reason: In strong form with two recent handicap wins. Steps up but is sharp.

selections.name: Auteur (gb)
selections.reason: Consistent performer who always gives a good effort. Good for exotic underneath.

danger_horse.name: Talgat
danger_horse.reason: Improving sort who broke his maiden recently. Could sneak into the superfecta.

selections.name: Splendino
selections.reason: Has been knocking on the door with multiple runner-up finishes. Finds a very winnable spot here.

selections.name: Hadya
selections.reason: Consistent mare who has been facing slightly better. Should appreciate the class relief.

selections.name: Nice Ruler
selections.reason: Winner four starts back and has been competitive since. Can factor if he gets a good trip.

selections.name: Scat Lady
selections.reason: Draws the rail and has shown the ability to hit the board at this level.

danger_horse.name: Excessiveness (gb)
danger_horse.reason: Has been running evenly in tough handicaps. Could wake up.

selections.name: Jaycle De Gree
selections.reason: In excellent form with two wins and a second in his last four starts. The one to beat.

selections.name: Le Sage
selections.reason: Classy type who has been running well in claiming and handicap company. Major player.

selections.name: Orlhena
selections.reason: Has won two of her last six and was a solid second last out. Very dangerous.

selections.name: Daddy Joy
selections.reason: Capable of popping at a price. Has a win at this level and draws the inside.

danger_horse.name: Tic Tac
danger_horse.reason: Winner last out and could carry that form forward despite the class hike.

selections.name: Marinaleda
selections.reason: Extremely consistent filly who has hit the board in her last three handicap starts. Ready to break through.

selections.name: King Trezy
selections.reason: Has been running well in similar spots and draws a great inside post to save ground.

selections.name: Britania
selections.reason: Winner two starts back and followed it up with a solid second. In peak form.

selections.name: Seona
selections.reason: Has faced Listed company recently. The drop back to handicap ranks makes her a major threat.

danger_horse.name: Dark Secret
danger_horse.reason: Broke his maiden last out and has been very consistent. Could step up.
